title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at KPMG India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at KPMG India
jsonLd.description:
KPMG India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KPMG India:
KPMG India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
